Set parameter is out of range

B phase to the power short-circuit

Text.Value: Device Access Point,A DAP represents the bus interface and thus determines the essential features of the IO device
Maintain the state before the fault

Limit Normally Open, Origin Brake Normally Close
Limit Normally Close, Origin Brake Normally Open
Limit Normally Close, Origin Brake Normally Close

Verify that the firmware version is correct
Check whether the power supply voltage of the system is normal
Check whether the power supply voltage of the system is normal
Check whether the power supply voltage of the system is normal
Check whether the power supply voltage of the system is normal
Check whether the onsite power supply is connected
Check whether onsite power cables are properly connected
Measure whether the onsite module is short-circuited
Check whether the module works properly
Power off, cool to room temperature and restart output
Check whether the module system works normally
Check whether the corresponding channel is short-circuited
Check whether the current of the corresponding channel exceeds the limit
Check whether the corresponding channel is connected to a load or sensor
Check whether the input signal of the corresponding channel exceeds the measurement range and the output signal exceeds the configurable range
Check whether the module is properly connected
Check whether the module is abnormal or interfered
Check whether the module is online or interfered with
Check whether the module is abnormal or interfered
Check whether the cable connection to the corresponding channel is normal
Check whether the module motor power supply is normal
Check whether the module motor power supply is normal
Check the motor, encoder and transmission mechanism to rule out out-of-tolerance causes
The module is powered on and off again
Use the upper computer to configure the module before use
The module is powered on again
Use the upper computer to check the configuration file and repair it
Adjust the Modbus slave configuration and download the configuration again
Check whether the air source pressure is within the normal range
Check whether the air source pressure is within the normal range
Device Access Point,A DAP represents the bus interface and thus determines the essential features of the IO device

Text.Value: 确认固件版本是否正确
检测系统侧电源电压是否正常
检测系统侧电源电压是否正常
检测系统侧电源电压是否正常
检测系统侧电源电压是否正常
检测现场侧电源是否接线
检测现场侧电源接线是否正常
测量模块现场侧是否短路
检测模块工作是否正常
断电冷却至常温后重新启动输出
检测模块系统侧工作是否正常
检测对应通道是否短路
检测对应通道电流是否超出限制范围
检查对应通道是否连接负载或传感器
检查对应通道输入信号是否超出测量范围，输出信号是否超出可配置范围
检查模块连接是否正常
检查模块是否存在异常或干扰等
检查模块是否在线或存在干扰等
检查模块是否存在异常或干扰等
检查对应通道接线是否正常
检查模块电机供电是否正常
检查模块电机供电是否正常
检查电机、编码器和传动机构，排除超差原因
使用上位机对模块进行配置后再使用
使用上位机检查配置文件并修复
调整Modbus从站配置并重新下载配置
检查气源压力是否在正常范围内
检查气源压力是否在正常范围内
